metadata.reference: J. W. Weber, V. E. Calado, M. C. M. van de Sanden. Optical constants of graphene measured by spectroscopic ellipsometry. Appl. Phys. Lett. 97, 091904 (2010) (Numerical data kindly provided by Jan-Willem Weber)
metadata.comments: Graphene (mechanically exfoliated flake). Thickness: 3.4 Å. Substrate: silicon with 98-nm silicon oxide layer.
